'''thabara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:taberna|taberna]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:taberna|taberna]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thabara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæbæræth|thæbæræth]] || [[word:thæbæræj|thæbæræj]] || [[word:thæbæræsh|thæbæræsh]] || [[word:thæbæræ|thæbæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thababarath|thababarath]] || [[word:thababaraj|thababaraj]] || [[word:thababarash|thababarash]] || [[word:thababara|thababara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabarath|thabarath]] || [[word:thabaraj|thabaraj]] || [[word:thabarash|thabarash]] || [[word:thabara|thabara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabafrath|thabafrath]] || [[word:thabafraj|thabafraj]] || [[word:thabafrash|thabafrash]] || [[word:thabafraf|thabafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thabaratha|thabaratha]] || [[word:thabaraja|thabaraja]] || [[word:thabarasha|thabarasha]] || [[word:thabaraka|thabaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thabarath|thabarath]] || [[word:thabaraj|thabaraj]] || [[word:thabarash|thabarash]] || [[word:thabara|thabara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thabarathal|thabarathal]] || [[word:thabarajal|thabarajal]] || [[word:thabarashal|thabarashal]] || [[word:thabarakal|thabarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thabarathatha|thabarathatha]] || [[word:thabarajaja|thabarajaja]] || [[word:thabarashasha|thabarashasha]] || [[word:thabaraka|thabaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thabarathan|thabarathan]] || [[word:thabarajan|thabarajan]] || [[word:thabarashan|thabarashan]] || [[word:thabarakan|thabarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thabarathaoro|thabarathaoro]] || [[word:thabarajaoro|thabarajaoro]] || [[word:thabarashaoro|thabarashaoro]] || [[word:thabarakaoro|thabarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
